title: ORAgentBench: Can LLM Agents Solve Challenging Operations Research Tasks End to End?

official_code_release.timing_boundary: The archived commit is approximately eight days after arXiv v1 publication and must not be treated as exact paper-time implementation evidence.
official_code_release.archive_integrity: zip test passed with no corrupt member

acquisition_checks.paper: The PDF is a valid 31-page document. The 1,896-line full-text extraction is non-empty and was spot-checked at the abstract, task-artifact appendix, multi-step protocol, and final case-study pages.
acquisition_checks.release: The GitHub commit API resolved the requested immutable commit, its recursive tree response is not truncated, and the exact-commit ZIP passed a full integrity test.
acquisition_checks.review_status: Primary paper and official pinned release acquired; deep paper/release audit remains pending.
